headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 13, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros suffered a 6-2 loss to the Seattle Mariners, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense going 2-for-4 with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs. George Kirby earned the win for the Mariners, pitching 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

Several teams suffered significant losses due to injuries. The Los Angeles Dodgers placed right-handed pitcher Ben Casparius on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The Baltimore Orioles also made a series of moves, transferring Yaramil Hiraldo to the 60-day injured list and placing Ryan Mountcastle on the 60-day injured list. Other teams affected by injuries include the Detroit Tigers, Philadelphia Phillies, Washington Nationals, and Houston Astros.

The Baltimore Orioles made a significant trade, acquiring 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash. The Philadelphia Phillies also made a move, acquiring RF Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall Short in Seattle**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a 6-2 loss to the Seattle Mariners, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense going 2-for-4 with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs. George Kirby earned the win for the Mariners, pitching 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Orioles in Thrilling 7-9 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs, with his second homer coming on a fly ball to center field.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Blowout Loss to Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5 in a one-sided matchup. Paul Skenes led the Pirates' pitching staff with 6.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Cubs 13-7**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Chicago Cubs, winning 13-7 behind a strong performance from Cristopher Sánchez, who earned the win with 6.0 innings pitched, 8 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Dodgers RHP Ben Casparius Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Ben Casparius has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The move was made on April 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Christian Encarnacion-Strand in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash.
